name: Fujian Snowman Co., Ltd.
summary: Fujian Snowman Co., Ltd. engages in the research, production, and distribution of ice machines in China. The company's principal products include industrial chillers and concrete cooling systems, as well as flake, tube, block, and plate ice machines. It also offers slurry ice and quick frozen machines, compressors, cold storage panels, evaporative condensers, and air coolers. The company provides its products for use in food processing and storage; man-made ski slopes; and cooling applications in construction, supermarkets, ocean fishing, nuclear projects, chemical and medical industries, etc. It offers its products under the SNOWKEY brand name. The company was formerly known as Change City Snowman Refrigeration Equipment Co., Ltd. Fujian Snowman Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Fuzhou, China.
